request_text: Investigate and isolate the SPEC_KITTY_SYNC_MINIMAL_IMPORT env-var leak that reds the pre-review-gate observability tests in the parallel CI suite (issue #2794). Confirm which setter leaks into the pytest-xdist worker process (production src/specify_cli/__init__.py:310, src/specify_cli/sync/daemon.py:890, or the module-level tests/runtime/test_bootstrap_unit.py:885), and specify the minimal robust remediation: an autouse conftest fixture that pins SPEC_KITTY_SYNC_MINIMAL_IMPORT/SPEC_KITTY_SYNC_DISABLE unset for the gate observability tests, plus fixing the leaking test setter.
